items.label: Open Mod Dashboard
items.description: Create a community analytics dashboard post showing top topics and trending discussions.

items.label: Flush ThreadStitch Index
items.description: Clear the similarity index and all cached data. Run after --reset to remove stale entries.

faq_threshold.label: FAQ Alert Threshold
faq_threshold.helpText: How many similar posts before a topic is marked Recurring and mods are alerted (default: 3)

digest_enabled.label: Weekly Digest
digest_enabled.helpText: Auto-post a community digest every Monday summarising top topics and trends (default: on)

min_similarity_pct.label: Minimum Similarity %
min_similarity_pct.helpText: Minimum similarity score (0-100) for a post to appear as Related (default: 40)

max_related_posts.label: Max Related Posts
max_related_posts.helpText: Maximum number of related posts shown per sticky comment (default: 5)
